MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Martin Gaehwiler Senior, Trustee is present. Represented Lana Anderson.
Attorney Weldon E. Bradstreet appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Sara Hernandez is present.
Attorney Supriya Molina Wunsh representing the defendant through limited scope.

The parties meet and confer.

The case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

The trial date of NOV-14-2011 is vacated.
